case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. JACK DANE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60494847) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANE, JACK $7,545.75 PRINCIPAL, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,849.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60494847)
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND (TRANSACTION ID # 60579978) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED DEFENDANT'S DEATH CERTIFICATE TO THE COURT. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff has provided defendant's death certificate to the Court. Order is signed in Open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/rbu)
